checkin.journal:
Really weird night, where I could not sleep more coz cosita was snoring but also at 5:30 there is something for me just cant sleep more, but my heart rate was super elevated, otherwise, the day was flowing fine, I got morning sun exposure which I felt was super imporatnt to get that super early on
huge blaoting on the plane had to go to toilet 3-4 times super gassy, but been noticing this in the last few days, dang … anyways so basically yeah 8/10 bloating… did get better after we landed though.
